message:
refactor(sqlite): migrate from mattn/go-sqlite3 to modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go)

Replace the CGo-dependent mattn/go-sqlite3 driver with modernc.org/sqlite,
a pure-Go SQLite implementation that eliminates the need for a C compiler
during builds and enables full cross-compilation support.

Key changes:
- Add internal/sqliteutil package providing FileDSN() and MemoryDSN() helpers
  that construct proper DSN strings with PRAGMA configuration via URL params
- Migrate internal/state/store.go from "sqlite3" driver to sqliteutil
- Migrate internal/serve/audit.go from "sqlite3" driver to sqliteutil
- Normalize audit timestamp formatting to RFC3339Nano with explicit UTC
  storage and multi-format parsing (handles SQLite's native datetime format
  differences between drivers)
- Use datetime() comparisons in audit queries for cross-driver timestamp
  compatibility
- Add ORDER BY fallback on id DESC for stable ordering when timestamps collide
- Add test coverage for SQLite-native timestamp format parsing
- Update go.mod: remove mattn/go-sqlite3, add modernc.org/sqlite and
  transitive deps (modernc.org/libc, mathutil, memory, google/uuid,
  ncruces/go-strftime, remyoudompheng/bigfft), bump golang.org/x/sys

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
